title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: The Americas is executing the world's most consequential stablecoin and AML/CFT regulatory buildout simultaneously. Sixteen U.S. federal and state-level rulemakings converge through Q3 2026—led by FinCEN's GENIUS Act implementation for payment stablecoin issuers and the once-in-a-generation BSA/AML program reform (comment period closes June 9). Canada advances Travel Rule enforcement and custody standards while four Latin American markets finalize VASP licensing regimes before Q4 deadlines. This
